burden.dalyPerCapita: low population burden; reproductive and bone health impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Repeat elevated prolactin; exclude pregnancy and thyroid disease; assess macroprolactin; pituitary MRI

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with access to dopamine agonists and imaging

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ESE guideline-based workup with MRI access
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Cabergoline first-line; surgery for resistant macroadenomas
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Medication-induced cases from antipsychotics and polypharmacy
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Specialist endocrine centers and broad access to imaging
